name: TruTrace Technologies Inc.
summary: TruTrace Technologies Inc., a service technology company, provides integrated software platform in Canada. The company offers StrainSecure, a cloud-based software to register and track cannabis intellectual property from genome to sale. Its platform is also used to store, manage, share, access quality assurance, testing details, and certificates of authenticity, as well as motion and movement intelligence on inventory from batches and lots to serialized items. The company also provides TruTrace, cloud-based SaaS software for the quality assurance, product lab testing, and blockchain verification for enterprises. TruTrace Technologies Inc. is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.
